name: J&J SNACK FOODS CORP
business: The Company manufactures snack foods and distributes frozen beverages which it markets nationally to the foodservice and retail supermarket industries. Its principal snack food products are soft pretzels, frozen novelties, churros, and bakery products, and its principal frozen beverage products are the ICEE brand frozen carbonated beverage and the SLUSH PUPPIE brand frozen non-carbonated beverage.
sellsTo: foodservice customers including snack bars, food stands in chain stores, malls, restaurants, stadiums, theme parks, movie theatres, convenience stores, schools, colleges, and institutions

exposures.sentence: The Company s principal snack food products are soft pretzels marketed primarily under the brand names SUPERPRETZEL, BRAUHAUS, FEDERAL PRETZEL, and BAVARIAN BAKERY, frozen novelties marketed primarily under the DIPPIN DOTS, LUIGI S, WHOLE FRUIT, ICEE, DOGSTERS, PHILLY SWIRL and MINUTE MAID* brand names, churros marketed primarily under the HOLA! brand name, and bakery products sold primarily under the READI-BAKE, COUNTRY HOME, MARY B S, DADDY RAY S and HILL & VALLEY brand names

If we are unable to prevent physical and electronic break-ins, cyber-attacks, and other information security breaches, we may suffer material financial and reputational damage, be subject to litigation or incur significant remediation costs or penalties.

Our business, results of operations, and financial condition could be materially and adversely affected by changes in consumer behavior arising from the increased use of prescription weight-loss therapies, including GLP-1 and related drugs.

Recently, the United States announced tariffs on imports from a broad range of countries which we anticipate will cause inflationary pressures, possible retaliatory tariffs and higher costs on certain of our raw materials and packaging imported from the affected countries.

catalysts.event: Project Apollo transformation program expected to generate at least $20 million run-rate operating income by fiscal 2026
catalysts.sentence: Project Apollo is expected to generate at least $20 million of run-rate operating income for the initiatives that are expected to be implemented by fiscal 2026.
